title: Using slow regular expressions is security sensitive
description: Using slow regular expressions can lead to performance issues and security vulnerabilities.
recommendation: Use efficient regular expressions or alternative methods.

noncompliant.code:
import re
pattern = re.compile(r'.*')
# slow regex usage
matches = pattern.finditer('long input string')
noncompliant.description: Slow regular expression compiled with a dot matches any character.

compliant.code:
import re
pattern = re.compile(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$')
# efficient regex usage
matches = pattern.finditer('valid_input')

why_is_this_an_issue: Slow regular expressions can lead to performance issues and security vulnerabilities such as denial of service.
how_to_fix: Use efficient regular expressions or alternative methods.

metadata.title: Using slow regular expressions is security sensitive
